name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake KH
recipeInstructions:
- Butter (1/2 cup)
- Sugar (1 cup)
- Vanilla (1 tsp)
- Eggs (2)
- Sour cream (1 cup)
- Flour (1 1/2 cups)
- Baking powder (1 1/2 tsp)
- Baking soda (1 tsp)
- Salt (1/8 tsp)
Mix topping ingredients, set aside. Cream butter with sugar and vanilla. Add eggs and sour cream. Combine dry ingredients. Add to butter mixture. Butter tube pan. Add half of the mixture. Sprinkle in half of the topping. Add remaining mixture. Sprinkle on remaining topping. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F.
